overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through Night City during golden hour. The player character crosses streets and walks along elevated sidewalks past neon-lit skyscrapers, large billboards, and industrial zones beneath highway overpasses.

events.description: turns right onto elevated sidewalk after crossing the street
moves from open street intersection onto elevated pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: crosses the street at a crosswalk and turns right onto an elevated sidewalk, passing by trash bags and homeless encampment

entered.detail: tall building with pink neon signage displaying Japanese characters and large holographic advertisements
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt
red traffic signal on pole at intersection corner
elevated concrete highway structure with support columns
cluster of garbage bags and cardboard boxes on sidewalk
metal safety railing along elevated walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a crosswalk facing a towering cyberpunk building with bright pink neon signage. The camera walks forward across the street, passes a trash encampment on the right, and turns right onto an elevated sidewalk with a metal railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with advertising billboards

events.description: passes extremely close to large billboard which temporarily fills the entire field of view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated sidewalk, passing by a large advertisement billboard and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow pants walking ahead on the sidewalk in same direction

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'The PASSION' advertisement in red and white
concrete bench with graffiti on sidewalk
small digital sign with rotating advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete sidewalk with metal railings, the camera passes a large red billboard advertising 'The PASSION' and continues past digital advertising kiosks. The neon cyberpunk building falls behind as the highway overpass becomes more prominent in the center of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with highway overpass crossing

events.description: crosses the street at the intersection beneath the highway overpass
enters semi-covered area beneath the highway overpass with industrial scenery

agents.ego_description: continues along the walkway, crosses the street at an intersection, and enters the shaded area beneath the highway overpass

notable_agents.action: silver car driving on the road below the overpass

entered.detail: tall palm tree at intersection corner
smoke stack emitting white steam into the air
green metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a busy intersection with palm trees and industrial smoke visible in the distance. After crossing the street, the scene transitions to a semi-covered area beneath the massive highway overpass, with green road barriers lining the path and vehicles passing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor beneath highway overpass with power infrastructure

events.description: passes wrecked car and industrial debris scattered along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through the gritty industrial area under the overpass, passing by wrecked vehicles and piles of trash

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light clothing walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: massive metal lattice electrical transmission tower with multiple power lines
destroyed and abandoned vehicle with open doors on the sidewalk
red and white striped construction barriers with fencing
additional power line towers in the industrial district

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive concrete highway overpass, the scene becomes industrial with large electrical transmission towers dominating the skyline. The camera passes a wrecked car and construction barriers on the left while continuing through the shaded corridor with mixed lighting from the setting sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit urban center into a shaded industrial zone beneath a massive highway. It begins at a crosswalk facing a towering building with bright pink neon signage, moving across the street past a trash encampment before turning onto an elevated concrete sidewalk. As the camera advances along the metal railings, the neon architecture recedes and is replaced by large red billboards and digital kiosks, while a highway overpass grows more prominent in the distance. The scene then opens into a busy intersection with palm trees and distant industrial smoke before shifting into a semi-covered corridor lined with green road barriers. Finally, the camera moves deep beneath the concrete overpass, passing a wrecked car and construction barriers as the skyline becomes dominated by large electrical transmission towers under the mixed lighting of the golden hour.
